description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-menu` (T2-09) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, menu item typed (label, icon, disabled, shortcut, submenu), open prop typed
2. Accessibility — `role="menu"` with `role="menuitem"`, keyboard: Arrow Up/Down navigate, Enter/Space activate, Escape close, Home/End, type-ahead search, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all keyboard navigation, disabled items, submenus, separator items, type-ahead, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — basic menu, with icons, with shortcuts, with submenus
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, focus indicator per item, CSS parts (menu, item, separator)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-menu — T2-09 antagonistic quality review

summary:
## Summary: Antagonistic quality review of `hx-menu` (T2-09)

### Changes Implemented
- Full antagonistic audit of all 8 files in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/`
- Wrote `AUDIT.md` with 21 findings (1 P0, 8 P1, 12 P2) across all 7 required audit areas
- Determined 4 of 7 quality gates fail — component is **BLOCKED** from merge

### Files Modified
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/AUDIT.md` — created (no code changes)

### Key Findings

**P0 (1):**
- No `aria-label`/`aria-labelledby` on `role="menu"` — WCAG 4.1.2 violation in a healthcare context

**P1 (8):**
- Type-ahead search entirely absent (required by WAI-ARIA and spec)
- No `open` property — component cannot be driven declaratively from Twig
- Roving `tabindex` not implemented — Tab escapes the menu unexpectedly
- No visible focus ring — only a background tint on `:focus-visible`, fails WCAG 2.4.7/2.4.11
- Internal `hx-item-select` event is composed (visible externally) but undocumented
- Submenu keyboard navigation (`ArrowRight`, `hx-item-submenu-open`) has zero tests
- No Drupal integration files (Twig, `.libraries.yml`, behavior)
- `focusFirst()`/`focusLast()` public API methods are untested

**P2 (12):** Weak wrap assertions, undocumented CSS custom props, inline SVGs bypass `hx-icon`, non-functional submenu story, no Storybook controls, dead `<script>` in story template, unreliable `_updateFocusedIndex` logic, `hx-menu-divider` styles not in dedicated file, and more.

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- None — documentation-only task, all findings are analytical

### Learnings
- The `_updateFocusedIndex` method has misleading dead code: `this.shadowRoot?.activeElement` on `hx-menu` can never return an item (items are in light DOM), but the fallback `item === active` works correctly because `document.activeElement` returns the shadow host. Logic is accidentally correct.
- The component is architecturally sound (Lit patterns, token usage, Shadow DOM) but missing WAI-ARIA compliant focus management, which is the most critical gap.

### Notes for Developer
- P0-01 and P1-04 (accessible name + focus ring) are the highest-priority fixes and should be addressed before this component is used in any production healthcare view
- P1-03 (roving tabindex) requires coordination between `hx-menu` and `hx-menu-item` — `hx-menu` must manage `tabindex` on all child items
- PR: https://github.com/bookedsolidtech/helix/pull/308

### Verification Status
- `npm run verify` passed (0 errors, 0 failures) — audit is documentation-only, no build artifacts affected
- No Playwright test required — this feature produces only an `AUDIT.md` file with no interactive functionality to verify
